column12: They were terrible but this is not a case for AI at the moment. There is extensive infiltrating tumor and tumor thrombus in the hepatic veins extending into the IVC. As a result, there is extensive heterogeneous attenuation of the liver and defining tumor boundaries is impossible on this single phase series. This took over an hour to do and I'm still not convinced that I've gotten it right.
column13: They were terrible but this is not a case for AI at the moment. There is extensive infiltrating tumor and tumor thrombus in the hepatic veins extending into the IVC. As a result, there is extensive heterogeneous attenuation of the liver and defining tumor boundaries is impossible on this single phase series. This took over an hour to do and I'm still not convinced that I've gotten it right.
